synopsis: Collects six Return of the Jedi prequel one-shots – Return of the Jedi – Jabba’s Palace (2023) #1, Ewoks (2023) #1, Lando (2023) #1, The Empire AKA Emperor Palpatine (2023) #1, The Rebellion (2023) #1, Smugglers (2023) #1, and possibly Stormtroopers (2023) #1 (this may have been cancelled or renamed)
title: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi
